member.planSubtitle: Start flexibly with monthly billing, or save more with annual billing.
member.plusSummary: For lightweight research, everyday questions, and core writing tasks.
member.proSummary: For frequent academic writing, deep reading, and polished deliverables.
member.maxSummary: For intensive research, full model access, and demanding workflows.

workspace.introDesc: Ask a question or import materials first.
workspace.stepAddDataDesc: Upload papers, LaTeX, code, or experiment materials.
workspace.stepInputTaskDesc: State whether you want a summary, translation, polish, or method breakdown.
workspace.stepFollowUpDesc: Keep iterating on the result, compare outputs, or export the conclusion.
workspace.starterDesc: Decide whether you are reading materials, writing content, or running a full workflow.
workspace.readingDesc: Understand papers, PDFs, and research files first
workspace.writingDesc: Work directly on abstracts, paragraphs, and LaTeX drafts
workspace.starterPaperSummaryPrompt: Please summarize this paper's research question, methodology, core conclusions, and key contributions.
workspace.starterPdfDeepReadPrompt: Using this PDF, extract the research question, key methods, experimental results, and the most worthwhile follow-up questions.
workspace.starterEnglishPolishPrompt: Please polish this English abstract while keeping it academically accurate, concise, and natural.
workspace.starterLatexTranslationPrompt: Please keep LaTeX formulas and commands unchanged and translate this content into Chinese.
workspace.starterCodeExplainPrompt: Please explain what this code does, its inputs and outputs, and the key implementation logic.
workspace.starterArxivSummaryPrompt: Based on this arXiv paper, summarize the core problem, method path, results, and the best follow-up questions to explore.
workspace.workflowActiveHint: Your current capability is ready. Add materials or task context to begin.
workspace.workflowSectionDesc: Use a full flow only when the task truly needs multiple steps.

footer.placeholderLoggedOut: Sign in to upload files, run research tasks, and save projects
footer.placeholderDragging: Release to import papers, LaTeX, or research materials
footer.placeholderContinueApp: Continue with {name} and add your objective, data, or writing request
footer.placeholderWithAbility: Add questions, paper excerpts, or task instructions for {name}
footer.placeholderAcademicDefault: Add a research question, paper excerpt, citation need, or academic file
footer.placeholderWithFeatures: {features} is enabled. Describe what you want to work on next
footer.placeholderDefault: Add a research question, writing request, method idea, or next step

academicPanel.title: Current Capability
academicPanel.subtitle: Review the capability you are using and add extra instructions if needed.
academicPanel.quickCoreEmpty: No quick core capabilities are available right now.
academicPanel.quickToolEmpty: No quick tools are available right now.
academicPanel.customInstructionPlaceholder: For example: keep technical terms such as Agent untranslated
academicPanel.customInstructionHint: Only add this when you need to constrain terminology, output format, or translation strategy.
academicPanel.workflowFallbackDesc: Choose a capability above or use one of the quick actions in the center.
academicPanel.selectedReadyHint: You can start the task now. Open More Settings only when you need to constrain terms, format, or emphasis.

workflow.customBuilderDesc: Combine capabilities in your own order.
workflow.stepArgsPlaceholder: Optional: add instructions for this step, such as terminology, output format, or emphasis
workflow.currentChainDesc: Lens will run this research pipeline automatically from top to bottom.

templates.paperPolishMindMap: Paper summary → Chinese polish → Mind map
templates.paperPolishMindMapPrompt: First summarize the paper's research question, method, and findings, then polish the result into clear Chinese, and finally turn it into a structured mind map.
templates.pdfEnglishPolishPrompt: First read the PDF deeply and extract the key points, then polish the final takeaway into natural academic English.
templates.arxivChinesePolishPrompt: First summarize this Arxiv paper, then rewrite it into fluent and formal Chinese.
templates.codePolishPrompt: First explain what this code does and how it works, then rewrite the explanation into clear Chinese.

chinesePolish.label: Chinese Polishing
chinesePolish.description: Polish academic Chinese for clearer structure and expression.

englishPolish.label: English Polishing
englishPolish.description: Polish academic English for grammar, style, and clarity.

mindMap.label: Mind Map
mindMap.description: Convert text into a structured mind map.

translation.label: Chinese-English Translation
translation.description: Translate academic content between Chinese and English.

bibtex.label: References to BibTeX
bibtex.description: Convert reference entries into BibTeX format.

codeExplain.label: Academic Code Explanation
codeExplain.description: Explain code meaning, inputs, outputs, and key logic.

paperSummary.label: Paper Summary
paperSummary.description: Read and summarize a paper's questions, methods, findings, and contributions.

pdfBatchSummary.label: Batch PDF Summary
pdfBatchSummary.description: Summarize multiple PDF files in one run.

pdfDeepRead.label: Deep PDF Reading
pdfDeepRead.description: Extract and analyze key arguments, methods, and findings from a PDF.

wordBatchSummary.label: Batch Word Summary
wordBatchSummary.description: Summarize multiple Word documents in one run.

arxivSummary.label: arXiv Summary
arxivSummary.description: Fetch and summarize an arXiv paper by identifier.

arxivEnglishSummary.label: arXiv English Summary
arxivEnglishSummary.description: Generate an English summary for an arXiv paper.

latexSummary.label: LaTeX Summary
latexSummary.description: Summarize LaTeX manuscripts while preserving structure.

latexPreciseTranslation.label: Precise LaTeX Translation
latexPreciseTranslation.description: Translate LaTeX content while preserving formulas and commands.

latexEnglishPolish.label: LaTeX English Polishing
latexEnglishPolish.description: Polish English in LaTeX without breaking commands.

latexChinesePolish.label: LaTeX Chinese Polishing
latexChinesePolish.description: Polish Chinese in LaTeX without breaking commands.

latexProofreading.label: LaTeX Highlighted Proofreading
latexProofreading.description: Mark and correct issues in LaTeX with highlighted edits.
